description:
Markdown-based note-taking app for developers


What's New
✨ New: AI-Powered Text Improvements
A new "Improve with AI" toolbar now appears when selecting text in a note.
Quickly rewrite, enhance, summarize, fix grammar, or transform selected content without leaving the editor.
🐛 Fixed: Empty Cells Preserved in Live Editor Tables
Fixed an issue where empty cells in Markdown tables could be lost when editing in Live Edit mode.
Table structure and formatting are now preserved correctly, including intentionally blank cells.
🐛 Fixed: Improved Web Search Query Handling
Fixed an issue affecting web search queries that include intent instructions.
Search requests are now interpreted more reliably, improving the accuracy and consistency of web search results.
